enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update from Boulder, covering his sleep schedule, website work (including Bible content and a Native American/Muslim legends section), minor home repairs and painting, and plans to focus on his website for the next three months. He also mentions needing to call his bank about a business loan.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: committed to dedicating the next three months primarily to building out his website
uncertain whether he wants to pursue it this week, preferring to stay focused on website work

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder Vlog for 3.27pm on January 26th.

I think I did a little bit of work on my education page too, which I neglected.

And, yeah, and I painted that, and then I painted all of the heaters in the apartment.

And, uh, yeah, so I kind of did, like, different things.

Um, yeah, so that's it.
Um, I need to call the bank to ask them what they need.
If they're going to give me a business loan.
